next_steps: Perform immunohistochemical staining for CD68, CD1a, and S100 on biopsy specimens to definitively screen for histiocytic disorders
Test for BRAF V600E mutation in tissue or peripheral blood
Measure serum VEGF and perform formal neurologic examination with electromyography to investigate POEMS syndrome
Complete skeletal survey and repeat serum protein electrophoresis with immunofixation to monitor monoclonal protein levels
Conduct comprehensive endocrine panel (including TSH, FSH, LH, and glucose tolerance) to screen for occult POEMS-related endocrinopathies
